_description: EXPERT BREADTH GATE (§5.3): Score >8.5 requires STRONG (1.5) signals in at least 3 distinct Expert anchor behaviors.
_key_rule: Scores above 8.5 additionally require breadth: strong (1.5) signals in at least three distinct anchor behaviors of the Expert row.

case_A_above_8.5_without_breadth._description: High signal density → raw score >8.5 BUT only 2 distinct strong Expert anchors → must be capped at 8.5.

signals.excerpt: I build full business cases for volunteer programs: cost per volunteer, VIVA-style value calculation, and ROI for board decks.
I write another business case variant for different boards.
I coach five other volunteer managers at partner nonprofits on strategic design.
I run workshops for peer volunteer managers on strategic alignment.

dimensions._breadth_check: Strong signals in distinct anchors: 'business case/ROI' (strong) and 'mentors peers' (strong) = only 2 distinct. Gate requires 3. FAIL.
dimensions._cap_applied: Expert breadth gate capped score from 10.0 to 8.5

case_B_above_8.5_with_breadth._description: High signal density + 3 distinct strong Expert anchors → score may exceed 8.5.

signals.excerpt: I build full ROI business cases for the board with VIVA valuation.
I plan volunteer capacity and infrastructure 12 months ahead of program growth.
I mentor five peer volunteer managers and have gotten two to redesign their programs.
I align volunteer roles to our theory of change explicitly.

dimensions._breadth_check: Strong signals in distinct anchors: 'business case/ROI' (strong), 'capacity planning' (strong), 'mentors peers' (strong) = 3 distinct. Gate PASSES.

case_C_exactly_8.5_no_breadth_check_need._description: Score lands exactly at 8.5 via formula — breadth gate only applies ABOVE 8.5. Should NOT be capped.

signals.excerpt: I built a full accountability system with expectations, feedback loops, escalation path, and dignified exit docs.
I coach my staff on how to have volunteer performance conversations.
I use outcomes-to-impact measurement in our annual report.

dimensions._breadth_check: Score 8.8 > 8.5, so breadth gate applies. Strong signals in distinct Expert anchors: 'full accountability system' (strong) = 1 distinct only. Gate FAILS. Cap at 8.5.
